rules: USER_VALUE reviewed XLSX corrections are upstream source of this artifact.
Unit-encoded fields such as *_mg, *_mL, particle_size_nm, zeta_mV, *_percent store numeric compare values only; raw reviewed cells are preserved in sidecar.
Value/unit pair fields split embedded units into the paired unit column and normalize unit spacing such as % w/v -> %w/v.
Mean ± SD cells are represented in compare table by the primary mean value; full raw mean±SD cell is preserved in sidecar for audit/modeling extension.
Non-PLGA polymer rows have blank LA/GA fields as not-applicable rather than literal N/A.
